reviewer.displayName: Maria de las Mercedes del Amo

reviews.comment:
Lo que mas me gusta es que tiene espacios verdes para estacionar es muy grande con todos los servicios y mesitas para sentarse entre los arboles para comer o tomar mate mientras haces una pausa en el viaje,dato en esta encontras lugar la q estan mas adelante es siempre un lio de gente y tenes que hacer cola para todo.

(Translated by Google)
What I like most is that it has green spaces for parking, it's very large with all the services and little tables to sit among the trees to eat or drink mate while you take a break on the trip. Note: in this one you can find a place, the one further ahead is always a mess of people and you have to queue for everything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnLWJDU0h3EAE

reviews.comment:
Estacion de servicio sobre ruta 2. Muy buena atención tanto en shop como en playa. Baños limpios. En shop hay enchufes para cargar celus o utilizar laptop. Posee un amplio parque arbolado, donde podés pasar la noche con el auto o casa rodante, aunque no lo recomiendo. Es un lugar súper ruidoso: las motos locales utilizan el parque para llegar a la ruta y la gente que se sienta a pasarxel rato, gritan, ponen música fuerte y deambulan alrededor de los autos estacionados. Los cestos de basura cercanos al parque, detonados de basura.

(Translated by Google)
Gas station on Route 2. Very good service both in the shop and on the forecourt. Clean restrooms. The shop has outlets for charging cell phones or using laptops. It has a large wooded park where you can spend the night in your car or RV, although I don't recommend it. It's a very noisy place: local motorcycles use the park to get to the highway, and people sitting around shout, play loud music, and wander around the parked cars. The trash cans near the park are overflowing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnbWVtMHlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención arboleda para estirar las piernas lastima muy caro para tomar o comer algo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, a lovely tree-lined area to stretch your legs, too bad it's very expensive for drinks or food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRX3RqUWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bastante descuidada el área de descanso. No sé si es por la temporada o que pero la Vi bastante sucia y oscura.
Otro punto en contra es que te cobran 500p el agua para el mate.
Baño y demás todo bien

(Translated by Google)
The rest area was quite neglected. I don't know if it's because of the season or what, but it looked quite dirty and dark.
Another downside is that they charge 500 pesos for water for mate. The bathroom and everything else was fine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURndnVDVEZBEAE

Los 3 playeros menos 10 estrellas.

For places like this, we prefer self-service.
